name: my-claude-plugins
description: Team plugin marketplace for Claude Code extensions

metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for team use

plugins.name: ripvec
plugins.description: Semantic code + document search. Model2Vec static bi-encoder (potion-base-32M default) with path-enriched BM25, function-level PageRank, and TinyBERT-L-2 cross-encoder rerank gated by corpus class. Single `search` MCP tool with intent-shaped scope (code / docs / all) plus include/exclude extension filters. Inverted BM25 postings, parallel BLAS sgemv, parallel repo-graph build. 20 tree-sitter grammars, 37 extensions, MCP + LSP server, CPU-only. Code: 42 ms p50 on a 1M-chunk corpus; prose: 34 ms p50 with NDCG@10 = 1.000 on a 15-query Gutenberg benchmark.

plugins.name: tracemeld
plugins.description: LLM-native performance profiling — import CPU profiles from any language (Rust, Go, Python, TypeScript, C/C++), find bottlenecks, detect waste patterns, and navigate to hot code via LSP. Includes 12 MCP tools, 6 language profiling skills, and a performance analysis agent.
